hero.paragraph1: Full-Stack Developer and AI Engineer with 6+ years of experience building data pipelines, RAG systems, and web applications across multiple industries. With a Mechanical Engineering background, I specialize in AI/ML solutions, ETL pipelines, and systems integration. Proficient in Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, and modern data stacks including PostgreSQL, MongoDB, BigQuery, with expertise in Amazon Web Services (AWS) and Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
hero.paragraph2: Throughout my career, I've deployed RAG systems and AI chatbots, developed back-office platforms and Management Information Systems for large-scale e-commerce operations, and built monitoring platforms for critical infrastructure. Recognized as Fellow of the LIF-7 Program (Royal Academy of Engineering, UK) and awarded in national hackathons. Bachelor's in Mechanical Engineering (UTFPR) with exchange at INSA Lyon (France).

volunteering.label: Volunteering
volunteering.description: Active contributor to social impact initiatives, from building transitional housing with TETO to reducing food waste with GoodTruck Brasil.

projects.heading: A few projects spanning design systems, product, and engineering.

metaproject.title: Metaproject
metaproject.subtitle: The portfolio itself is a project.

architecture.title: Component Architecture
architecture.description: Modular HTML components loaded dynamically via IntersectionObserver. 17 components organized by priority: header (immediate), critical (immediate), lazy (on scroll).

dataRendering.title: Data-Driven Rendering
dataRendering.description: 8 JavaScript renderers fetch JSON data and render HTML dynamically. Projects, awards, experience, and more - all managed through structured data files.

performance.title: Performance First
performance.description: Lazy loading for images and components. WebP format, skeleton placeholders, optimized aspect ratios for minimal CLS. Videos hosted on Google Cloud Storage.

theme.title: Dark/Light Theme
theme.description: Theme switching with localStorage persistence and smooth transitions. Modular CSS architecture split into 5 organized files.

awards.title: Awards & Recognition
awards.subtitle: Achievements and honors throughout my career

posts.title: Posts
posts.subtitle: Technical articles and insights on Medium

artworks.title: Artworks
artworks.subtitle: Traditional drawing and murals that shaped my approach to technical work. The spatial reasoning, perspective understanding, and attention to detail developed through years of studying classical art masters directly inform modern skills in CAD modeling, 3D visualization, and product design, bridging the timeless principles of visual composition with contemporary engineering practice.

hero.paragraph1: Desenvolvedor Full-Stack e Engenheiro de IA com 6+ anos de experiência construindo pipelines de dados, sistemas RAG e aplicações web em múltiplas indústrias. Com formação em Engenharia Mecânica, me especializo em soluções de IA/ML, pipelines ETL e integração de sistemas. Proficiente em Python, JavaScript/TypeScript e stacks de dados modernos incluindo PostgreSQL, MongoDB, BigQuery, com expertise em Amazon Web Services (AWS) e Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
hero.paragraph2: Ao longo da minha carreira, implementei sistemas RAG e chatbots de IA, desenvolvi plataformas back-office e Sistemas de Informação Gerencial para operações de e-commerce em larga escala, e construí plataformas de monitoramento para infraestrutura crítica. Reconhecido como Fellow do Programa LIF-7 (Royal Academy of Engineering, Reino Unido) e premiado em hackathons nacionais. Bacharel em Engenharia Mecânica (UTFPR) com intercâmbio na INSA Lyon (França).

architecture.title: Arquitetura de Componentes
architecture.description: Componentes HTML modulares carregados dinamicamente via IntersectionObserver. 17 componentes organizados por prioridade: header (imediato), críticos (imediato), lazy (no scroll).

dataRendering.title: Renderização Orientada a Dados
dataRendering.description: 8 renderizadores JavaScript buscam dados JSON e renderizam HTML dinamicamente. Projetos, prêmios, experiência e mais - tudo gerenciado através de arquivos de dados estruturados.

performance.title: Performance em Primeiro Lugar
performance.description: Lazy loading para imagens e componentes. Formato WebP, placeholders skeleton, aspect ratios otimizados para CLS mínimo. Vídeos hospedados no Google Cloud Storage.

artworks.title: Obras
artworks.subtitle: Desenho tradicional e murais que moldaram minha abordagem ao trabalho técnico. O raciocínio espacial, compreensão de perspectiva e atenção aos detalhes desenvolvidos através de anos estudando mestres da arte clássica informam diretamente habilidades modernas em modelagem CAD, visualização 3D e design de produtos, conectando os princípios atemporais da composição visual com a prática contemporânea de engenharia.
